channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lucy's hunter revealed: Giant crocodile terrorized early human ancestors
item.description: A newly identified crocodile species, nicknamed Lucy's hunter, lived in Ethiopia's rivers more than 3 million years ago.

item.title: Dark energy survives major challenge as universe keeps accelerating
item.description: A claim that the universe's expansion was an illusion has been tested and failed, confirming dark energy's role.

item.title: Learning an instrument in your 70s may help preserve memory
item.description: Taking up a musical instrument later in life could keep the brain younger. A four-year study found that older adults who kept playing music...

item.title: Alien planet spins reveal hidden clues about world formation
item.description: Using the Keck Observatory, astronomers measured the spins of dozens of giant planets and brown dwarfs. They discovered that giant p...
